title: pelargonium × rhodiola
intro: Pelargonium × rhodiola, also known as the Rose Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Rhodiolanum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × rhodiola include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating symptoms of depression, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
